hero.name: Imansha Dilshan
hero.title: AI Engineer | Researcher | Full-Stack Developer
hero.tagline: Building production-grade Generative AI systems, LLM-powered RAG pipelines, and scalable full-stack applications.

about.summary: Final-year Software Engineering undergraduate and AI Engineer with hands-on experience designing and deploying production-grade Generative AI systems, including LLM-powered RAG pipelines, multi-agent frameworks, and multimodal AI services. Industry experience at WSO2 contributing to enterprise Generative AI initiatives, complemented by full-stack development across React, Spring Boot, FastAPI, and cloud platforms (Azure, GCP, Choreo). Passionate about building scalable, evaluation-driven AI products that solve real-world problems.
